text:
Market today: The mood is mixed. Positive news on AI collaboration could boost tech/chip names, but new global tariff threats introduce significant uncertainty and potential supply chain disruptions for your concentrated portfolio.

Your holdings: Your leveraged SOXL is down -38.11% and SPAL -52.96%, both with stops far above current prices, signaling significant risk. QQQI is also at a SELL status, down -5.44%, and nearing its 52 stop. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on any further developments regarding global tariffs, which could pressure tech supply chains. Also, monitor sentiment around AI, as it remains a key driver for your chip names.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing risk in your leveraged and underperforming positions, especially with tariff headwinds emerging.
plays: Review your leveraged ETFs, SOXL (-38.11%) and SPAL (-52.96%). Both have stops significantly above current prices, indicating blown risk levels.
QQQI is at a SELL status, down -5.44%, and nearing its 52 stop. Consider trimming if it breaks that level.
Given the AI summit news, NVDA (scanner entry 208.55-208.34, stop 206.33) is a potential long setup to watch.
